     model.to(device)

 

     total_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())

     logger.warning(f'Total parameters: {total_params:,}')

 

-    # Optimizer with different LR for encoder and decoder

+    # Optimizer with different lr for encoder

-    decoder_params = list(model.decoder.parameters())

+    decoder_params = [p for n, p in model.named_parameters() if not n.startswith('encoder.')]

     optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW([

     ], weight_decay=args.weight_decay)
